steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The sentence's subject is "Florida resident Frederick Hill." The phrase between commas describes him, but the sentence still needs a finite main verb to complete the independent clause.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is an infinitive, Choice C is a present participle, and Choice D is a participial phrase. None can serve as the finite main verb of the sentence. The answer is A.
